warning.default: Bounded install analysis executes untrusted package build and install hooks in a disposable container. It is never enabled by default and does not prove that unobserved behavior is safe.
warning.title: Warning

confidence.description: Rule-author-assigned confidence label. This is not yet calibrated against a published malicious-package evaluation corpus.
confidence.title: Confidence

false_positive_rate.description: Estimated false-positive prior from rule metadata. This field is not an empirically measured false-positive rate until a matching calibration corpus and benchmark metrics are published.
false_positive_rate.title: False Positive Rate

disclaimer.default: These findings are heuristic indicators for review, not proof that the package is malicious.
disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
